title: chrysocephalum apiculatum subsp. congestum
intro: Chrysocephalum apiculatum subsp. congestum, also known as the Yellow Buttons plant, is a flowering perennial plant native to Australia. The plant is traditionally used in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects. The health benefits of Chrysocephalum apiculatum subsp. congestum include reducing inflammation and promoting wound healing, as well as exhibiting antimicrobial properties that can help combat bacterial infections. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, tinctures, or infusions, and it is often used in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
